diagnosis_scope: v7 recalibrated topk perturbation and cost stress failure

topk_perturbation.rule: all perturbed annual_relative_return values must be >= 0.0
topk_perturbation.diagnosis: failure is primarily driven by the base edge already being negative; perturbations remain close to the base result but still below the zero floor

cost_stress.diagnosis: failure is consistent with a weak gross edge combined with near-daily rebalancing and roughly 10% daily turnover, not with a low-liquidity flag artifact

low_liquidity_context.interpretation: after the unit and rank-direction fix, low-liquidity exposure is no longer the dominant explanation for the two remaining audit failures

recommended_next_step: diagnose whether the weak gross edge comes from the momentum-only score itself or from execution/cost drag before opening a new candidate scheme
